options.text: You're welcome! I hope you had a great time!
Maybe next time I'll be better.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! I hope you had a great time!' 是对感谢的自然、积极回应，符合服务场景的礼貌与热情。干扰项 'That's fine, no problem.' 语气过于平淡，缺乏情感回应；'I didn't do much, honestly.' 降低自身价值，不符合服务行业积极反馈原则；'Maybe next time I'll be better.' 暗示本次服务不佳，与游客的正面评价矛盾。
content.speakerText: Thanks so much for today, Lisa! You made it so fun and easy!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你今天的一切，丽莎！你让旅程太轻松有趣了！

options.text: I'll leave a 5-star review right away!
I don't use apps much, so I won't rate you.
I didn't like the tour, so I won't rate it.
Can I give you a 3-star instead?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'I'll leave a 5-star review right away!' 是积极、配合的回应，符合导游期待。干扰项 'I don't use apps much, so I won't rate you.' 直接拒绝，缺乏礼貌；'I didn't like the tour...' 与前提 'if you loved the tour' 矛盾；'Can I give you a 3-star instead?' 暗示不满，破坏服务氛围。
content.speakerText: If you loved the tour, I'd really appreciate a 5-star rating on the app!
content.speakerTextCn: 如果喜欢今天的行程，麻烦在App上给个五星好评吧！

options.text: Thank you for saying that! It means a lot to me.
Oh, it was just my job.
I hope you didn't spend too much money.
Maybe next time you can be more quiet.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thank you for saying that! It means a lot to me.' 是真诚、情感丰富的回应，体现职业素养���干扰项 'Oh, it was just my job.' 将服务贬低为机械任务，削弱情感连接；'I hope you didn't spend too much money.' 无关且可能引发误解；'Maybe next time you can be more quiet.' 是负面评价，完全不合语境。
content.speakerText: I really enjoyed the trip and want to thank you for all your hard work.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受这次旅行，想感谢你付出的辛勤努力。
